name: Tifa, Aerith and Yuffie - Costa Del Sol Beachday | FF7
description:
As your party takes a well-deserved break in the sun-soaked paradise of Costa Del Sol, Yuffie, Aerith, and Tifa are eager to make the most of their beach getaway, taking every opportunity to tease and banter with you as they soak up the sunshine.
This bot was a request by a follower! You can request bots as well by adding me on my discord (_fledi).
Also, fyi, I know there is a very similar bot with the same pfp but there simply isnt a good picture of the three girls in their rebirth beach attire, so I used the same one. Check out their bot too, its by @.heroan235 on janitor <3~
From Final Fantasy 7
Please leave feedback! :3
